description_long: This is a modern, boxy house with a flat roof and clean geometric lines, surrounded by a mix of tall palm trees and leafy deciduous trees. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some sections featuring wood paneling and glass railings. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The house includes a visible garage, a covered entryway, and multiple outdoor terrace spaces, some with greenery and seating. The landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing open space and a connection to the outdoors. The overall design reflects a contemporary architectural style with an emphasis on simplicity and integration with nature.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, wood accents, and surrounded by palm and leafy trees. Features include a garage, terraces, and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, and a covered terrace with visible trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended terrace, wood paneling, and more of the surrounding palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying large windows, a raised deck, and dense tree coverage at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the flat roof, dense foliage, and additional terrace space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalistic covered porch adjacent to the garage
